meanings.definition: reduce the level of land, as by erosion
reduce in worth or character, usually verbally
examples: She tends to put down younger women colleagues
His critics took him down after the lecture

meanings.definition: lower the grade of something; reduce its worth
harmful to the mind or morals
examples: corrupt judges and their corrupting influence
the vicious and degrading cult of violence

meanings.definition: used of conduct; characterized by dishonor
